title: New SQL injection bypass in Express.js parameterized queries CVE-2026-99901

metadata.description: Security researchers discovered a critical SQL injection bypass that works against Express.js apps. The payload ' OR ''=' bypasses sanitization via empty string comparison. PostgreSQL dollar-quoting $$' OR 1=1--$$ also works. Unicode NFKC normalization bypass replaces quotes with fullwidth variants. CVE-2026-99901 assigned. Affects Express 4.x/5.x with MySQL/PostgreSQL/SQLite.
